messages.body: Hi Monica, As mentioned earlier, we’ve already canceled your subscription. Kindly check your spam or junk folder for the confirmation email.
Can you please turn off and put my booking site back to normal without this landing page
I’m still getting the notifications for bookings through Zoca so it is not turned off 🤷🏻‍♀️
Yes Monica, as informed your subscription is already cancelled with us!

Just checking in to make sure that this will be turned off the end of today. I have to turn over my scheduling to another company that I’ve purchased a big piece of equipment with. They are hoping to arrange some events …
OK so everything will be done the end of October Pretty sure everything was already reviewed and approved

Hey Monica,  We’ve prepared the calendar for the month of Oct and have pushed it to the ZOCA app. Kindly review and approve the posts from your end so we can proceed with publishing them on your social media pages.  Feel…

Hi Monica,   Apologies for the delayed response—I’ve been on leave for the past two days. And, I have checked with my team, and they have confirmed that your subscription is cancelled with us, I would request you to chec…

Hi Monica, As discussed on our call yesterday, I’ve asked my team to process the cancellation of your subscription. You’ll receive a confirmation email within the next 48 hours.  Thank you for your time with us — we’d be…
This is great news thank you so much😊

Call me at 904-463-0224
As you can see, I tried to start canceling this mid October, so I would like to count that as my 30 days notice And have this ending on November please
Yes Monica, I completely understand where you’re coming from and truly appreciate you sharing this so openly. Will update you tomorrow morning on this.
Sure Monica, will get on a call with you!

Hi Monica,  Hope you’re doing well.  This is Shikha, your new Account Manager. I sincerely apologize for the delay in getting back to you and for the inconvenience this has caused — I completely understand your frustrati…
Okay i can talk at 8:30 this morning
Hello i need someone to reach out to me please
Hi, I guess the call dropped. If you could please call me back. I tried calling back, but no answer.
Your call has been forwarded to an automatic voice message system. 9044-630-224 is not available.

Hello, hey, I guess the call dropped. I was trying to come back in a minute. Yeah, I don't know. Like, there was some network issue. Yeah. Yeah. Please tell me. It's okay. Listen, I totally understand where you're coming…

Can someone please call me

Hi, my name is Monica with Halo Spa, and I need to cancel my Zolka app that you guys have with me. Can you please call me back? 904-463-0202. Hey, whatever. I need to pay to get out of the contract. I just need to cancel…

I need to cancel this !!!! My sales are down i have had clients complain about the extra step since you put a splash page on my website  So how do I cancel???
Hey Monica, thank you for your response. We’ve noted this and will reach out if we need any further information.
Someone reached out, asking me what I wanted to focus on and I haven’t heard back from them but I did say I wanted to focus on deep tissue massage and anti-aging facial with vitality booth
Im not sure why you are asking me this ?
Hii Monica  I am able to access your website. Now how can I help you?

Yes, please if we could focus on deep tissue massage And anti-aging facial with vitality booth   Also, I need to make sure that my images that I have provided for you are not being shared or used anywhere else as well as…
